title: WorkspaceFile
description: RFC 0059. A versioned, tenant·workspace-scoped ground-truth file in the `host.workspace` store. Returned by `GET /v1/host/workspace/files/{path}` and `PUT …/{path}`; the `list` endpoint returns the same shape minus `content` (metadata only). `path` is a flat namespace with `/`-in-names (NOT nested directories) — no `..`, no leading `/` (the pattern enforces this). Writes are atomic and optimistically concurrent via the `etag` token (`If-Match`). When `capabilities.workspace.versioned: true`, prior versions are retrievable via `?version=N`. Content is SR-1-redacted on write (RFC 0059 §E WSR-1) — never the BYOK plaintext.

path.description: Workspace-relative path. Flat namespace with `/`-in-names; MUST NOT contain `..` or a leading `/` (the pattern forbids both). Stable identity of the file within the `{tenant, workspace}` scope.

content.description: UTF-8 file body. SR-1-redacted on write per RFC 0059 §E WSR-1 — a value the run's BYOK vault resolved is persisted as `[REDACTED:<secretId>]`, never the plaintext.

contentType.description: Advisory MIME type of `content`. Defaults to `text/markdown` (the ground-truth-file convention).

version.description: Monotonic version. 1 on first create; each successful `PUT` bumps it by one. The latest version is always retrievable; historical versions are best-effort up to `capabilities.workspace.maxVersions`.

etag.description: Opaque version token for `If-Match` optimistic concurrency. A `PUT` carrying a stale `If-Match` MUST be refused with `409 workspace_conflict`.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the write that produced this version.
